title: Creativo Prosecco Brut Doc Treviso
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the double arched cane system, with a growing density of 3,500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: Once they have reached the ideal ripeness, the best grapes are collected and cold-macerated for several hours. Subsequently, they are softly pressed and the must obtained is fermented with selected yeasts at a controlled temperature. After fermentation, the wine obtained is left to rest in steel barrels until a second fermentation, which takes place in an autoclave using the Charmat method. Only after a few months of autoclave maturation is the bottling actually done.
abbinamenti: It is the ideal wine for aperitifs and toasts; it pairs magnificently with raw shellfish.
tastingNoteParagraphs: Bright straw yellow color, fine and persistent perlage, fragrances of flowers and white-pulp fruit. When tasted, the wine is dry, fresh, fine and well balanced.

title: Pinot Nero Spumante Millesimato Brut
coltivazione: Double overturned training system, 3,500 vines per hectare.
vinificazione: Early harvesting of the grapes. After crushing, they are lightly pressed off the skins. The must is then sent to fermentation in steel tanks at a temperature of around 13 °C. Second fermentation occurs according to the Charmat method for at least 12 months.
abbinamenti: Excellent as an aperitif. Goes extremely well with entrées and molluscs. Excellent with shellfish.
tastingNoteParagraphs: This wine has a straw-yellow colour with coppery hues, and a fine and persistent bead. It smells fresh and elegant to the nose, with an initial hint of bread and a citrus fruit finish. It has a salty, balanced and extremely pleasant taste to the palate. Good aromatic persistence.

title: Creativo Prosecco Brut Doc Treviso Magnum
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the double arched cane system, with a growing density of 3,500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: Once they have reached the ideal ripeness, the best grapes are collected and cold-macerated for several hours. Subsequently, they are softly pressed and the must obtained is fermented with selected yeasts at a controlled temperature. After fermentation, the wine obtained is left to rest in steel barrels until a second fermentation, which takes place in an autoclave using the Charmat method. Only after a few months of autoclave maturation is the bottling actually done.
abbinamenti: It is the ideal wine for aperitifs and toasts; it pairs magnificently with raw shellfish.
tastingNoteParagraphs: Bright straw yellow color, fine and persistent perlage, fragrances of flowers and white-pulp fruit. When tasted, the wine is dry, fresh, fine and well balanced.

title: Pinot Nero Spumante Brut Magnum
coltivazione: Double overturned training system, 3,500 vines per hectare.
vinificazione: Early harvesting of the grapes. After crushing, they are lightly pressed off the skins. The must is then sent to fermentation in steel tanks at a temperature of around 13 °C. Second fermentation occurs according to the Charmat method for at least 12 months.
abbinamenti: Excellent as an aperitif. Goes extremely well with entrées and molluscs. Excellent with shellfish.
tastingNoteParagraphs: This wine has a straw-yellow colour with coppery hues, and a fine and persistent bead. It smells fresh and elegant to the nose, with an initial hint of bread and a citrus fruit finish. It has a salty, balanced and extremely pleasant taste to the palate. Good aromatic persistence.

title: Prosecco 950 Extra Dry Doc Treviso
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Sylvoz system, with a growing density of 3,300 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The free-run must obtained from the first soft pressing of the grapes is fermented at the controlled temperature of 16 °C, to preserve the freshness and fragrance typical of Prosecco. The wine is then transferred to an autoclave, to make it sparkle using the Charmat method, and finally bottled.
abbinamenti: A chalice of this wine is ideal as an aperitif with the entire range of light appetizers, and pairs elegantly with seafood dinners.
tastingNoteParagraphs: A sparkling wine with a deep straw color, it has a fine and persistent perlage, as well as a delicately fruity aroma like Golden apple and a light hint of exotic fruit and herbs.

title: Prosecco Rosé Millesimato Brut Doc Treviso
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the double arched cane system, with a growing density of 3,500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: This sparkling is obtained from the union of 90% of Prosecco wine and 10% of pinot noir. The must obtained from the first soft pressing of the glera grapes is fermented at the controlled temperature of 12 °c to preserve the freshness and fragrance typical of Prosecco. The Pinot Noir is vinified as a rose’ leaving the skin in contact with the must for a few hours. After maturing for a few months, the wine obtained is combined in the autoclave for the foam press according to the Charmat or martinotti method. After at least 2 months of autoclave maturation, the sparkling obtained is ready to be bottle.
abbinamenti: It is the ideal wine for aperitifs and toasts; it pairs magnificently with seafood and raw shellfish.
tastingNoteParagraphs: Sparkling with a pale pink color, it has a fine and very persistent perlage. On the nose it has floral aromas of wild strawberries, peaches and white pulp fruits. On the palate it has a dry, fresh and harmonious flavor.

title: Glera Spumante Millesimato Extra Dry
coltivazione: Sylvoz training system, 3.300 vines per hectare.
vinificazione: Free-run must obtained from the soft pressing of Chardonnay and Glera grapes is fermented at a controlled temperature of around 16 °C. The resulting wine shall then be transferred to the autoclave to undergo the Charmat process and then bottled.
abbinamenti: Ideal as an aperitif. It goes extremely well with all entrées and fish dishes.
tastingNoteParagraphs: This sparkling wine has a fine, elegant and persistent bead. It is a weak straw-yellow colour, with greenish hues. It smells intense, clear a fruity to the nose, with the typical varietal aroma, and tastes dry, full, a bit salty and harmonic.

title: Anema Raboso Spumante Dolce
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Sylvoz system, with a growing density of 3.500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The must is left to ferment in contact with the skins for 5 days. Special attention is paid during the punching-down and pumping-over processes, which aim at extracting the colour while not enriching the wine with astringent tannins.
abbinamenti: It is an eclectic wine which accompanies both imaginative snacks and the warm conviviality of a classic table prepared with a variety of cold cuts and meat dishes.
tastingNoteParagraphs: The wine’s colour is an intense and bright purple. The fragrance is that of marasca cherry and wild rose. Its captivating and seducing flavor enhances a perfect balance of rustic Raboso and the freshness of sparkling wine.

title: Pinot Grigio DOC Delle Venezie
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the double arched cane system, with a growing density of 4.000 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The grapes are softly pressed. Fermentation of the must starts in thermo conditioned tanks where the temperature never exceeds 16 °C. It must sit with its noble lees until bottling.
abbinamenti: The wine pairs well with herb and  fish risottos, as well as with light white meat and fish appetizers.
tastingNoteParagraphs: This wine features an elegant light straw yellow colour with copper glints. Its distinctive fragrance is reminiscent of the summer countryside during haymaking. Its taste is round and elegant, and resembles the flavor of bread crust.

title: Chardonnay IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Guyot system, with a growing density of 4.000 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The must obtained from soft pressing is left to ferment for about 10 days at 16 °C. It is then placed to ripen in steel tanks until bottling.
abbinamenti: Excellent with vegetable and fish appetizers, soups, and light  fish dishes.
tastingNoteParagraphs: A light straw yellow wine with glints that become golden over time. Its fragrance is fine, intense and delicate, and is reminiscent of acacia flowers and the aroma of fresh bread from the oven. The wine features a well balanced, persistent and very harmonious flavor.

title: Sauvignon IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the spurred cordon system, with a growing density of  3.500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The must is left in contact with the marc for 12 hours at a temperature of 10°C, and is then separated from the solid segment. After soft pressing, it is fermented in steel tanks at 16 °C. It is kept in its noble lees for about 3 months and is bottled in March.
abbinamenti: The wine pairs successfully with seafood appetizers and main courses and white fish with light sauces. It is also excellent for snacks.
tastingNoteParagraphs: This is a light straw yellow colored wine with slightly golden glints. Its fragrance is delicately aromatic and reminiscent of yellow pepper, exotic fruit and nutmeg. The flavor is sapid, elegant and velvety.

title: Suadente Glera IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the double arched cane system, with a growing density of 3.300 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The crushed grapes are immediately refrigerated and left in contact with their marc for at least 12 hours (cryomaceration). Subsequently, they are softly pressed and the product obtained is fermented for a fortnight at a controlled temperature of about 16 °C. After fermentation, the wine is left to rest in steel barrels until bottling.
abbinamenti: It pairs brilliantly with the noble prosciutto of the Italian tradition, as well as with delicate fish and white meat.
tastingNoteParagraphs: The wine features a bright straw yellow color. The fragrance expresses delicate acacia and apple, but the palate reveals the wine’s name – smoothly enticing – with fresh, sapid and soft notes.

title: Incrocio Manzoni IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Sylvoz system, with a growing density of 3.600 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: Once collected, the grapes are immediately refrigerated at 8°C, then left to rest for about 15 hours in steel tanks. A soft pressing follows. The must is fermented at a controlled temperature for about 15 days. After fermentation, the first racking is carried out and the wine is left to rest in cement tanks for one year. The wine is occasionally stirred to bring back into suspension the yeasts that are naturally present.
abbinamenti: It is ideal for fish and vegetable risottos, as well as aged cheese.
tastingNoteParagraphs: The wine features a deep straw yellow colour with light cedar nuances; it smells like exotic yellow-pulp fruit, such as grapefruit and pineapple. But the wine manifests its character on the palate: elegant,  very, well- balanced, long and persistent.

title: Traminer IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the double arched cane system, with a growing density of 4.000 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The must is left in contact with the grape skins for about 12 hours at a temperature of 9 °C and then separated from the solid parts; after a soft pressing, the wine is sent to ferment in steel tanks at a temperature of 13 °C. There it rests, in contact with its own fine lees for about three months, to be subsequently bottled in March.
abbinamenti: Fish, shellfish and sea food salad dishes
tastingNoteParagraphs: This wine has an intense straw-yellow colour with golden hues; the nose is characterized by an aromatic mix with tropical fruit, such as pineapple and mango, notes and candied fruit notes. It tastes quite alcoholic, aromatic with very low acidity.

title: Pinot Nero IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the spurred cordon system, with a growing density of 3.500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The grapes are left to steep in steel tanks at a controlled temperature for ten days. During this time, they undergo pumping-over and punching- down cycles in alternation.
abbinamenti: The wine is excellent with meat dishes and pleasant served with snacks.
tastingNoteParagraphs: The wine’s colour is a bright ruby red with glints of purple. Its aroma is intense and pleasantly fruity, reminiscent of blackberries that have just been harvested. The taste is round and satisfying.

title: Cabernet IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Guyot system, with a growing density of 4.000 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The grapes are left to steep for 10-12 days in steel tanks at a strictly controlled temperature. During this time, they undergo pumping-over and punching-down cycles in alternation.
abbinamenti: The wine enhances the flavour of noble poultry, game, as well as roasted white and red meat.
tastingNoteParagraphs: The colour is a deep ruby red with glints of purple. The fragrance is herbaceous, of violet and liquorice. The taste is well-balanced and elegant, satisfying even the most discerning palates.

title: Malbech IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Sylvoz system, with a growing density of 3.500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The grapes are left to steep in steel tanks for 10 days at a controlled temperature. During this time, they undergo pumping-over and punching-down cycles in alternation.
abbinamenti: It pairs excellently with salami, cold cuts, poultry, and roast meat in general.
tastingNoteParagraphs: The wine’s colour is a ruby red, with an aroma of raspberry, a full body, and a slightly herbaceous taste.

title: Merlot IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Sylvoz system, with a growing density of 3.500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The grapes are left to steep for 8-10 days in steel tanks at a strictly controlled temperature. During this time, they undergo pumping-over and punching-down cycles in alternation.
abbinamenti: It is the classic wine for an entire meal and pairs excellently with all kinds of meat and oily fish, such as trout, sturgeon and feel.
tastingNoteParagraphs: The colour is a ruby red with garnet highlights. The aroma recalls the undergrowth and cherry. The wine features a velvety, full and pleasantly degreasing taste.

title: Refosco IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Sylvoz system, with a growing density of 3.500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The grapes are left to steep in steel tanks for 10 days at a strictly controlled temperature. During this time, they undergo pumping-over and punching-down cycles in alternation.
abbinamenti: This rustic wine is especially suited for traditional dishes. It is excellent with fatty meat, stew, poultry and game.
tastingNoteParagraphs: Ruby-red coloured, and when young the wine tends to be deep purple. Its aroma is fruity, reminiscent of blackberry and raspberry. A fragrant wine with character, it enhances its fantastic characteristics as it ages.

title: Cabernet Sauvignon Affinato in botte IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Guyot system, with a growing density of 3.900 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The grapes are steeped for 2 weeks in steel tanks. Upon racking, the wine is directly poured into small French oak barrels and left to rest for at least 14 months before bottling.
abbinamenti: Excellent with red meat.
tastingNoteParagraphs: Deep garnet red colour, and its aroma is fine and full-bodied with hints of marasca cherry, vanilla and pepper. It is well-balanced and persistent, with sweet and soft tannins, as well as harmonious and well-structured.

title: Merlot Affinato in botte IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Guyot system, with a growing density of 4.000 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The grapes are steeped for 2 weeks in steel tanks. Upon racking, the wine is directly poured into oak barrels and left to rest for at least 10 months before bottling.
abbinamenti: The wine is excellent served with red meat and game.
tastingNoteParagraphs: Deep ruby red colour with glints of garnet. The aroma is intense and balmy, reminiscent of blackcurrant and violet with a hint of pepper. The flavour is velvety, full, and pleasantly tannic.

title: Profondo Cabernet Affinato in botte IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Guyot system, with a growing density of 4.000 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: Upon ripening, the grapes are placed in steel tanks at 25 °C to ferment for about 10 days. During this time they undergo pumping-over and punching-down cycles, which make it possible to extract most of the noble substances in the skins. When fermentation is almost complete, the product is racked and left to ripen in cement barrels.
abbinamenti: It pairs well with red meat dishes and rich main courses.
tastingNoteParagraphs: Ruby red colour with purple hues. The fragrance is flowery like violet and liquorice, while the palate is sapid, soft and elegant.

title: Maiuscolo Pinot Nero Affinato in botte IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Guyot system, with a growing density of 4.200 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: When the grapes are healthy and ripe they are crushed and fermented in steel barrels at a controlled temperature for a fortnight. During this period, they are softly punched-down several times. Following fermentation, the product is racked and the wine obtained is left to rest for a few months in small oak barrels.
abbinamenti: It pairs well with red meat and game.
tastingNoteParagraphs: Ruby red colour with garnet hues and fragrances of blackberries and small red berries. This wine features a lightly fresh, sapid, soft and harmonious taste.

title: Chardonnay Frizzante IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Guyot system, with a growing density of 4.000 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The must obtained from soft pressing is left to ferment for about 10 days at 16 °C. It is then placed to ripen in steel tanks until bottling.
abbinamenti: The wine is recommended as an aperitif and served between meals, or with  fish and vegetable appetizers and light fish dishes.
tastingNoteParagraphs: This sparkling wine has a light straw yellow colour with greenish glints. Especially  fine and elegant, its fragrance is reminiscent of Golden apples and the crust of bread fresh from the oven. The taste is very fine and harmonious, and is reminiscent of honey, acacia flower, and apple. It is a dry, slightly sparkling wine, which is enticing and always pleasant.

title: Verduzzo Frizzante IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Sylvoz system, with a growing density of 3.500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The must is left in contact with its marc for about 24 hours. The product obtained is then fermented for 15 more days in steel containers and, before fermentation is complete, cooled and moved to tanks where it awaits bottling.
abbinamenti: End-of-meal wine.
tastingNoteParagraphs: A sparkling wine featuring a deep golden yellow colour, with a full-bodied and fresh aroma reminiscent of robinia flowers and vague violet. The wine features a soft and fruity, pleasantly sweet taste.

title: Raboso Frizzante IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Sylvoz system, with a growing density of 3.500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The must is left to ferment in contact with the skins for 4-5 days. Special attention is paid during the punching-down and pumping-over processes, which aim at extracting the colour while at the same time not enriching the wine with astringent tannins.
abbinamenti: It is excellent served between meals, and pairs pleasantly with fast and fresh dishes, salami, cold cuts, and soft cheeses.
tastingNoteParagraphs: The wine smells like wild strawberries and has a pleasantly acidulous taste.

title: Rosato di Raboso Frizzante IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Sylvoz system, with a growing density of 3.500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: This wine is obtained from Verona Raboso and Piave Raboso grapes fermented for a few hours in their skins. Then, partially fermented, the wine is cooled and preserved in steel barrels until bottling.
abbinamenti: A wine suitable between meals, or with typical dishes of salami and cold cuts.
tastingNoteParagraphs: The wine features a cherry red colour with purple glints. Its bouquet is full-bodied. Its fragrance is reminiscent of wild violets and blackberries, and its flavour is pleasantly acidulous and thirst quenching.

title: Complice Passito IGT Veneto
coltivazione: Pinot Noir and Verduzzo vineyards.
vinificazione: The grapes are harvested by hand and placed on racks. They are left to wither and dry for a few months in the open air in a special area of our winery. In December we proceed to crush the grapes, and the product obtained is then fermented for a few months. After fermentation, the wine is left in small wooden barrels (5 hl) for 12 months. It is bottled only when it reaches the right degree of maturation.
abbinamenti: The wine pairs well with blue cheese, aged cheese, and pâté de fois gras. It is also excellent enjoyed on its own.
tastingNoteParagraphs: The wine features a shining amber colour. Its fragrance brings to mind ripe yellow fruit,  fig and honey. The palate reveals marvelous sensations of sweetness, softness and warmth.

title: Ciacola Passito IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Sylvoz system, with a growing density of 3.500 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The grapes are harvested late in the season. The must is left in contact with its marc for about 48 hours. After being racked, the product is placed for 15 more days in steel containers until fermentation is complete.
abbinamenti: As a dessert wine, it is ideally served with soft, fatty and aged cheeses, or unleavened pastry.
tastingNoteParagraphs: This wine features a deep golden colour, a fruity fragrance like pineapple and bitter almond, with hints of flowery acacia honey and wisteria. The palate is warm and well-balanced, persistent with a hint of astringency; it is harmonious and possesses good structure.

title: Raboso Passito IGT Veneto
coltivazione: The vines are grown using the Guyot system, with a growing density of 4.200 plants per hectare.
vinificazione: The grapes are harvested and placed on racks where they are left to wither and dry for almost three months depending on the weather conditions in a special area of our winery. In December we proceed to crush the grapes and the must is left in contact with its marc for about ten days. The product obtained is then slowly fermented for twenty more days and subsequently placed in small wooden barrels. It is bottled only when it reaches the right degree of maturation.
abbinamenti: Meditation wine that pairs well with dry pastries and aged cheese.
tastingNoteParagraphs: Ruby red colour with garnet hues and with an intense flavours of mature fruits like marasca cherry. The palate is sweet and velvety.
